title: .NET install script download fails with SSL/TLS authentication error from builds.dotnet.microsoft.com on Windows runner
error_pattern: D:\a\aspire\aspire\tests\Shared\InstallSdk.targets(37,5): error MSB3923: Failed to download file "https://builds.dotnet.microsoft.com/dotnet/scripts/v1/dotnet-install.ps1". The SSL connection could not be established, see inner exception. ---> Authentication failed, see inner exception. ---> The Local Security Authority cannot be contacted

occurrences.job: Tests / Prepare Homebrew installer artifacts / Prepare Homebrew cask
